user_goal: Find papers in the corpus that target inference latency reductions and summarise their mechanisms.

trace.name: summarise
trace.output_summary: Both papers reduce latency: RA-MoE via routing bias, Listwise-Aligned BGE by removing the reranker.

trace.content: RA-MoE biases router logits with an EMA of expert utilization to cut p99 decode latency 38%. Listwise-Aligned BGE distills a reranker's signal into the bi-encoder, halving query latency by removing the reranker.
